title: Blood God (Origin)
description: (NEEDS ORIGINS) a little tribute to techno (made for my own modpack)
body:
You are one of his followers. From years of training and watching his techniques, you could say you're now a descendant of his.

🟢 He Never Dies (Primary): Ability that regenerates your health and gives you effects similar to a totem, which goes on cooldown until the next day (10 minutes).

🟢 Sword master: Deal +3 attack damage with swords.

🟢 Familiar Connection: Hoglins are neutral to you unless provoked.

🟢 Blood For The Blood God: Every time you kill something, you gain absorption 3 for 10 seconds. Cannot stack.

🟢 Holy Nutriments: Enchanted golden apples, golden apples, carrots, potatos and golden carrots give 2 more hunger shanks.

🔴 Noble Burden: All sources of regeneration have their effects halved.

🔴 Battle Hunger: Hunger drains after killing an entity, 10 second cooldown between each drain. You also slowly starve when at 2 hearts.

🔴 Inflexible: Due to your inexperience with the present, shields are useless to you.
